calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Orderandturnoverorder
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
David Cook, Esq. 415-989-4730 Cook Collection Attorneys for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order and turnover order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment of rights, restraining order, and turnover order" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct The Names Of The Defendant Under C.C.P. Section 473(A)(L) And Inherent Power
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S Motion To Correct The Names Of The Defendant Under C.C.P. Section 473(A)(L) And Inherent Power.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to correct the names of the defendant under C.C.P. section 473(a)(1) and inherent power" is granted.

Order and amended judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
